mnemonics: F.I.R.S.T. Tests: Fast, Isolated, Repeatable, Self-validating, Timely
keyPoints: Unit tests verify individual components in isolation
Integration tests check interactions between multiple components
End-to-end tests validate the entire system workflow from a user's perspective
commonMistakes: Testing distributed systems in a non-production-like environment
Not accounting for network latency and partitions in test scenarios
Writing tests that are flaky and produce inconsistent results
